analysis.headline: Roche Group announces immediate termination of its global neuro-degenerative and Central Nervous System (CNS) research pipeline.
analysis.portfolio_impact: Roche’s abrupt termination of its neuro‑degenerative pipeline directly contravenes the client’s red line against abandoning Parkinson’s research, weakening the defensive pharma core and likely prompting a divestment consideration.
